title: Lischwert 2Pack LightSaber,Connectable 2-in-1 Dueling Metal Light Sabers Changeable 7 RGB Color 3 Modle Voices,Smooth Swing & Fight Sound Effects, Gift Party Favors&Kids Fancy Dress（Sliver）
features: Lightsabers meet UK toy standards and are suitable for children over 6 years old. The handle is made of high-quality aluminum alloy, and the blade is made of high-strength and high-light-transmitting PC.
Lightsabers can emit 7 colors and perform movement and combat simulation - smooth swing and combat sound effects as you perform different combat moves.
The lightsaber has a built-in replaceable lithium battery and USB charging cable. Charge for 2-3 hours, you can play for 4-5 hours.

Two RGB lightsaber could be attached as a long one by 2-in-1, the blade and hilt can also be disassembled. The lightsaber is perfect for kids cosplay, Halloween costume parties, movie lovers and the perfect gift for kids.
Every purchase comes with a 12-month warranty, so you can buy with confidence knowing that you are covered.
description: Product Description Previous page Red Lightsaber Red represents evil and anger （Darth Vader）(Asajj Ventress) (Desann) (Tavion) Green Lightsaber Green represents wisdom, rationality and maturity (Luke Skywalker)（Kit Fisto) (Saesee Tiin) Blue Lightsaber Blue represents bravery, daring to speak and do, straightforward and emotional (Obi-Wan )（Juhani） Yellow Lightsaber Yellow represents potential （Plo Koon）（Bastila Shan） Purple Lightsaber Purple represents power (Mace Windu )(Mara Jade )(Jaina Solo) Next page 1 Red Lightsaber 2 Green Lightsaber 3 Blue Lightsaber 4 Yellow Lightsaber 5 Purple Lightsaber Previous page Portable Lightsaber Become a real Jedi or Darth Vader, you can always bring your lightsaber and use your force Dueling Lightsaber Support adult and child duels, we use the blade made of the strongest material in the universe, don't worry about damage Cosplay and Parties Can participate in various lightsaber cosplay, Christmas, Halloween, Birthday parties, Star Wars Day. Rechargeable Battery Charge for 3-4 hours, you can play for 2-3 hours. Easy to place Only need a bracket, you can put it anywhere you want, collection room, bedroom, living room, study room.
